name: ar-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, declarations, motions, notices, and proposed orders for Arkansas courts. Applies Ark. R. Civ. P. 10/11 statewide formatting; includes Pulaski County Circuit Court and Benton County Circuit Court specifics plus a county-courts roll-up; supports pro se workflows. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (ARCP civil rules, Ark. R. Evid. evidence rules, fees and costs, local rules, citation format per the Arkansas Supreme Court Rule 5-2 (public-domain citation)) plus subject-matter bundles. The first subject-matter bundle, ar-consumer-debt, covers FDCPA / Reg F / state UTPA-equivalent / chain-of-title doctrine. All workflows are skills (no slash commands) so the agent invokes them automatically from natural-language requests.
